message:
feat(replay): CLI surface for replay diff and inspect commands (ft-og6q6.6.1)

Core replay_cli module: DiffRunner, InspectResult, RegressionSuiteResult,
ReplayOutputMode, ReplayExitCode, SpeedArg, EquivalenceLevelArg.
CLI subcommands: ft replay diff (--baseline/--candidate/--budget/--robot),
ft replay inspect (--json). 29 unit tests + 15 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
